en.title: Alvin Toffler Prophecies - 15 Predictions from the Futurist (1928-2016) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: American futurist Alvin Toffler (1928-2016) left 15 prophecies in Future Shock, The Third Wave, and Powershift, covering information overload, telecommuting, knowledge economy, prosumerism, and more.
